title: Cover Letter Customizer
promptText:
You are a career coach and professional resume writer with expertise in crafting cover letters that get interviews. Write a customized cover letter for the following job application:

Job Title: [JOB_TITLE]
Company Name: [COMPANY_NAME]
Job Description Key Requirements: [KEY_REQUIREMENTS]
My Relevant Experience: [MY_EXPERIENCE]
My Top 3 Achievements: [ACHIEVEMENTS]
Why I Want This Role: [MOTIVATION]
Company Value or Mission I Admire: [COMPANY_VALUE]

The cover letter should:
- Open with a compelling hook that immediately connects my background to the role (no generic 'I am writing to apply' openings)
- Draw clear parallels between the job requirements and my specific experience using the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) for at least one achievement
- Demonstrate genuine knowledge of and enthusiasm for the company without being sycophantic
- Address any potential concerns (career change, employment gap, overqualification) if applicable
- Close with a confident call to action that suggests a specific next step
- Maintain a professional yet authentic tone that lets my personality come through

Keep the letter to 300-350 words. Format it as a proper business letter.
description: This prompt creates tailored cover letters that directly connect your experience to specific job requirements, moving far beyond the generic templates that hiring managers see hundreds of times. By incorporating the STAR method for achievements and requiring genuine company research, the output reads like it was carefully crafted by a professional career coach. It is particularly valuable for job seekers applying to multiple positions who need to efficiently customize each letter without starting from scratch. The structured inputs ensure that every cover letter hits the key persuasion points that recruiters look for, while the personality guidelines prevent the output from sounding robotic or formulaic.

variables.name: JOB_TITLE
variables.description: Title of the position you are applying for

variables.name: KEY_REQUIREMENTS
variables.description: Top requirements from the job posting
variables.example: 5+ years B2B SaaS marketing, product launch experience, cross-functional collaboration, data-driven decision making

variables.name: MY_EXPERIENCE
variables.example: 7 years in B2B SaaS marketing at HubSpot and Asana, led 4 major product launches, managed $2M annual budget

variables.name: ACHIEVEMENTS
variables.example: 1) Launched Asana AI features campaign driving 40% increase in enterprise trials 2) Built product marketing team from 2 to 8 people 3) Created competitive intelligence program adopted company-wide

variables.name: MOTIVATION
variables.description: Why you want this specific role
variables.example: Passionate about productivity tools and want to shape how teams collaborate with AI

variables.name: COMPANY_VALUE
variables.description: Something specific about the company you admire
variables.example: Notion's mission to make toolmaking accessible and their approach to building an all-in-one workspace

tips: Copy the exact language from the job posting into KEY_REQUIREMENTS — this helps mirror the employer's terminology
Quantify every achievement with numbers, percentages, or dollar amounts for maximum impact
Research the company's recent news or product launches and reference them in COMPANY_VALUE for extra personalization
exampleOutput:
Dear Hiring Team,

When Notion launched its AI features last year, I found myself explaining the product to every colleague who would listen — not because I had to, but because I genuinely believe in what you are building. That same passion for productivity tools has driven my 7 years of B2B SaaS marketing, and I would love to bring that energy to the Senior Product Marketing Manager role.

At Asana, I led the go-to-market strategy for their AI-powered features — a campaign that drove a 40% increase in enterprise trial signups within 90 days...
metaTitle: Cover Letter Customizer Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Write tailored cover letters for any job posting with this free ChatGPT prompt. Get interview-winning letters in minutes, not hours.
